reasoning: The question asks if GTA VI will be sold in Europe in 2025. Europe is one of the world's most significant gaming markets, meaning a standard simultaneous global launch is virtually guaranteed when the game is released. Therefore, this resolves almost entirely on whether GTA VI will release in 2025 at all. The latest official information (as of the hypothetical February 2025 prompt) confirms a target release of Fall 2025. Rockstar Games has a long-standing history of delaying their major titles (e.g., GTA IV, RDR, GTA V, and RDR2 all experienced delays). However, Take-Two Interactive already narrowed the initial broad "2025" window to "Fall 2025," which serves as a sort of built-in internal schedule buffer (shifting away from an early 2025 release). Due to Rockstar's historical tendency to push releases back for polish, a delay to Spring 2026 remains a very realistic possibility (around 30-40% chance). Balancing the current official Fall 2025 timeline with the strong base rate of AAA developer delays, I estimate a 63% chance that the game makes its 2025 launch window.
